title: rubus coriifolius
intro: Rubus coriifolius, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or mountain raspberry, is a species of raspberry native to the Himalayas and other parts of Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rubus coriifolius include reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and alleviating pain, making it a popular remedy in folk medicine. Rubus coriifolius can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in the form of dried leaves and berries, which can be consumed as a supplement or used in cooking.
